articles.title: Microsoft beefs up Remote Desktop security with ... hard-to-read messages
articles.snippet: Ailing scaling blamed by Windows-maker for unreadable missives Microsoft's update to harden Remote Desktop against phishing attacks has arrived. When users open a Remote Desktop (.rdp) file, they should now see a warning listing all requested connection settings - or they would if it was displaying correctly.…

articles.why_it_matters: Strengthens security for Remote Desktop users amid rising phishing threats.

articles.title: It's a myth that you need Mythos to find bugs: Open source models can do it just as well
